BiomedParseSegmentation.description: Tissue segmentation for radiology images with pixel-accurate region boundaries. Require BiomedParseClassification to follow it.

BiomedParseClassification.description: Tissue classification for radiology images. Must follow BiomedParseSegmentation.

TotalSegmentatorSegmentation.description: Organ segmentation for radiology images. When segmenting brain, brain structure, liver, spleen, prioritize this node over BiomedParse.
TotalSegmentatorSegmentation.outputs: Organ masks (brain, brain structure, liver, spleen)

TotalSegmentatorClassification.description: Organ classification for radiology images. When classifying brain, brain structure, liver, spleen, prioritize this node over BiomedParse.
TotalSegmentatorClassification.outputs: Organ classifications (brain, brain structure, liver, spleen)

MuskEmbedding.description: Generates patch embeddings for pathology whole slides used downstream by patch classification.

MuskClassification.description: Patch-based classification model for pathology whole slides. You must use MuskEmbedding node to generate patch embeddings first.

SegmentationNode.description: Default, production-validated nuclei segmentation on WSI using StarDist 2D_versatile_he. Produces per-nucleus contours, centroids, probability, and embeddings. Prerequisite for per-cell metrics and classification. Recommended first choice for H&E pathology.

InstanSegNode.description: Alternative nuclei segmentation using InstanSeg's lightweight transformer. Produces per-nucleus contours, centroids, probability, and PLIP embeddings. Use only when explicitly requested or when StarDist is known to underperform on the modality.

VISTA.description: An interactive foundation model for histopathology image segmentation.

ClassificationNode.description: Per-nucleus classifier assigning classes (e.g., tumor_cell, lymphocyte); consumes nuclei segmentation results.

CellCharter.description: Spatial transcriptomics clustering for identifying tissue domains and cellular neighborhoods. We need nuclei segmentation to precede this tasknode and also nuclei classification to tell us what is the name of the cell clusters.

Ark.description: Task-specific model for specifically ONLY chest X-ray analysis with direct prediction scores; standalone model that does not require other nodes.

CardiacMRSegmentation.description: Task-specific model for cardiac MRI segmentation to identify myocardium (MYO), left ventricle (LV), and right ventricle (RV); specialized for myocardial hypertrophy analysis; standalone model that does not require other nodes.

GPT-4o Agent.description: Read the result from result files. Custom Python analysis for counts/ratios/spatial queries if needed; no visualization unless explicitly requested.
